cast.name: 叶卡婕琳娜·维尔科娃 Ekaterina Vilkova
安吉丽娜·斯特雷奇娜 Angelina Strechina
茵嘉·斯特热尔科娃-欧波尔迪娜 Inga Strelkova-Oboldina
米哈伊尔·埃夫拉诺夫 Mikhail Evlanov
亚历山大·塞梅切夫 Aleksander Semchev
娜塔莉亚·加拉尼娜 Natalya Garanina

introduction: An alien, whose ship crashed, enters the philology department teacher Semyonov, the most spineless creature on the planet. To his horror, the alien learns that humanity is burning oil, which was created by scientists from their more advanced civilization as a cure for all diseases. He wants to warn his "fellow tribesmen" so that together they can cleanse the Earth of "human pests". But to do this, he needs to repair the ship in a quiet place. However, he is not allowed privacy by Semyonov's daughter Alyona, his ex-wife Katya, the dean, the commandant-ufologist and a strong passion for his colleague Anna Mikhaylovna.
